assessment: Ring  Aether is a right-spin Blade from the Beyblade X BX line. Documented weight: 37.14g. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: TyrannoRoar
description: TyrannoRoar Blade from the UX system.
assessment: TyrannoRoar is a right-spin Balance type Blade from the Beyblade X Unique Line. Debuted in the SharkScale Deck Set. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: ClockMirage
description: ClockMirage Blade from the UX system.
assessment: ClockMirage is a right-spin Stamina type Blade from the Beyblade X Unique Line. Its circular shape with 60 edges references Twisted Tempo. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: PegasusBrush
description: PegasusBrush Blade from the UX system.
assessment: PegasusBrush is a right-spin Stamina type Blade from the Beyblade X Unique Line. Debuted in Random Booster Vol. 8. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: SolBrave
description: SolBrave Blade from the UX system.
assessment: SolBrave is a right-spin Balance type Blade from the Beyblade X Unique Line. Debuted in Random Booster Vol. 8. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: HellsBrave
description: HellsBrave Blade from the UX system.
assessment: HellsBrave is a right-spin Attack type Blade from the Beyblade X Unique Line / Custom Line. Debuted in the SharkScale Deck Set with the Jaggy Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: BulletGriffon
description: BulletGriffon Ratchet-Integrated Blade from the UX system.
assessment: BulletGriffon is a right-spin Balance type Ratchet-Integrated Blade from the Beyblade X Unique Line Expand Blade (Infinity) system. It splits into an upper Bullet and lower Griffon during battle. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: GloryValkyrie
description: GloryValkyrie Ratchet-Integrated Blade from the UX system.
assessment: GloryValkyrie is a right-spin Attack type Ratchet-Integrated Blade from the Beyblade X Unique Line Expand Blade (Infinity) system. It features a spring-loaded bound mechanism for impact recoil. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: DranBrave
description: DranBrave Blade from the CX system.
assessment: DranBrave is a right-spin Attack type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Dran Lock Chip, Brave Main Blade and Slash Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: WizardArc
description: WizardArc Blade from the CX system.
assessment: WizardArc is a right-spin Stamina type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Wizard Lock Chip, Arc Main Blade and Round Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: PerseusDark
description: PerseusDark Blade from the CX system.
assessment: PerseusDark is a right-spin Defense type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Perseus Lock Chip, Dark Main Blade and Bumper Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: HellsReaper
description: HellsReaper Blade from the CX system.
assessment: HellsReaper is a right-spin Balance type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Hells Lock Chip, Reaper Main Blade and Turn Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: RhinoReaper
description: RhinoReaper Blade from the CX system.
assessment: RhinoReaper is a right-spin Defense type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Rhino Lock Chip, Reaper Main Blade and Charge Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: HellsArc
description: HellsArc Blade from the CX system.
assessment: HellsArc is a right-spin Stamina type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Hells Lock Chip, Arc Main Blade and Turn Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

assessment: FoxBrush is a right-spin Attack type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Fox Lock Chip, Brush Main Blade and Jaggy Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

assessment: PegasusBlast is a right-spin Attack type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Pegasus Lock Chip, Blast Main Blade and Assault Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

assessment: CerberusFlame is a right-spin Stamina type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Cerberus Lock Chip, Flame Main Blade and Wheel Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

assessment: WhaleFlame is a right-spin Balance type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Whale Lock Chip, Flame Main Blade and Massive Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: CerberusDark

assessment: CerberusDark is a right-spin Attack type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Cerberus Lock Chip, Dark Main Blade and Wheel Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: WolfHunt
description: WolfHunt Blade from the CX system.
assessment: WolfHunt is a right-spin Stamina type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Wolf Lock Chip, Hunt Main Blade and Free Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: SolEclipse
description: SolEclipse Blade from the CX system.
assessment: SolEclipse is a right-spin Balance type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Sol Lock Chip, Eclipse Main Blade and Dual Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: EmperorMight
description: EmperorMight Blade from the CX system.
assessment: EmperorMight is a right-spin Balance type Expand Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Emperor Metal Lock Chip, Might Main Blade and Heavy Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: PhoenixFlare
description: PhoenixFlare Blade from the CX system.
assessment: PhoenixFlare is a right-spin Defense type Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Phoenix Lock Chip, Flare Main Blade and Zillion Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: BahamutBlitz
description: BahamutBlitz Blade from the CX system.
assessment: BahamutBlitz is a right-spin Attack type Expand Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Bahamut Lock Chip, Break Over Blade, Blitz Metal Blade and Knuckle Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: KnightFortress
description: KnightFortress Blade from the CX system.
assessment: KnightFortress is a right-spin Defense type Expand Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Knight Lock Chip, Guard Over Blade, Fortress Metal Blade and Vertical Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: RagnaRage
description: RagnaRage Blade from the CX system.
assessment: RagnaRage is a right-spin Stamina type Expand Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Ragna Lock Chip, Flow Over Blade, Rage Metal Blade and Erase Assist Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: UnicornDelta
description: UnicornDelta Blade from the CX system.
assessment: UnicornDelta is a right-spin Balance type Expand Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Unicorn Lock Chip, Peak Over Blade, Delta Metal Blade and Odd Assist Blade. The Triple Style gimmick lets players rotate the three Blade parts to shift between Attack, Balance and Defense orientations. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: BrachioWhip
description: BrachioWhip Blade from the CX system.
assessment: BrachioWhip is a right-spin Stamina type Expand Blade from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines the Brachio Lock Chip, Whip Metal Blade and Outer Over Blade. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: T. Rex
description: T. Rex Blade from the Jurassic World collaboration.
assessment: T. Rex is a right-spin Stamina type Blade from the Beyblade X Jurassic World collaboration. Paired with the 1-80 Ratchet and Gear Ball Bit in its stock combo. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: Mosasaurus
description: Mosasaurus Blade from the Jurassic World collaboration.
assessment: Mosasaurus is a right-spin Defense type Blade from the Beyblade X Jurassic World collaboration. Paired with the 9-60 Ratchet and Unite Bit in its stock combo. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: Spinosaurus
description: Spinosaurus Blade from the Jurassic World collaboration.
assessment: Spinosaurus is a right-spin Attack type Blade from the Beyblade X Jurassic World collaboration. It features a heavy sail-like jagged perimeter and is paired with the 3-85 Ratchet and Accel Bit. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: Quetzalcoatlus
description: Quetzalcoatlus Blade from the Jurassic World collaboration.
assessment: Quetzalcoatlus is a right-spin Defense type Blade from the Beyblade X Jurassic World collaboration. It uses an aerodynamic wide-wing silhouette paired with the 4-55 Ratchet and Defense Bit. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.
